'''Pei Yi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] dancer, a member of a little-known troupe.

She hired rogue [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Diskret Stahn]] for passage to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], to meet her colleagues for a prestigious show there. En route, Stahn's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was damaged in a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] attack, forcing them to land on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] for repairs and supplies. She missed her performance on Naboo, and was stranded on [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] with Stahn for a long period of time.

==Behind the scenes==
Pei Yi appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
